Off Calendar Apr-26-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Michele L. McGill, Esq., (415) 334-8080 for plaintiffs/moving parties Enrique Malvar, Pearly Paguntalan.
No appearance by opposing party.

The Court adopted its Tentative Ruling. PLAINTIFFs ENRIQUE MALVAR, PEARLY PAGUNTALAN's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award, For Attorney Fees And Costs, And For Judgment is granted. Arbitration award confirmed per CCP 128.5. Attorney fee awarded in the amount of $1,746.30. Counsel shall submit proposed form of order. (301/MCBRI/cl) Reporter: Joseph Vickstein CSR#4780

For Order To Show Cause Regarding Compliance With The Court'S Order Granting Defendant'S Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Aug-12-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Michele L. McGill, Esq. (415) 334-8080 for Plaintiff Malvar
Jason A. Pollack, Esq. (Court Call) (310) 824-8733 for Defendant DiJamco
RULING:
HEARING HELD. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE REGARDING COMPLIANCE WITH THE COURT'S ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION: Given the representations of Counsel, this matter shall be submitted to Karl E. Droese, Jr. for arbitration no later than 08/19/04. If the matter has not been submitted to arbitration by 08/19/04, the Court will entertain a motion for sanctions. Attorney Pollack to prepare a proposed form of order. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Sara Lerschen, CSR #6213

For Order To Show Cause Regarding Compliance With The Court'S Order Granting Defendant'S Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jul-30-2004 Continued To Aug-12-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jason Pollack, Esq. (310) 824-8733 for Defendant and Moving Party DiJamco
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: COMPLIANCE WITH THE COURT'S ORDER OF 07/13/04: In error, the order to show cause was not calendared. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: COMPLIANCE WITH THE COURT'S ORDER OF 07/13/04 is CONTINUED to 08/12/04. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration;Petition
Off Calendar Jun-17-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jason Pollack, Esq. (310) 824-6733 for Defendant and Moving Party Dijamco (Court Call)
Michele L. McGill, Esq. (415) 334-8080 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Malvar
RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling: DEFENDANT ERNESTO DI JAMCO'S Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration: GRANTED. Counsel are directed to identify an arbitrator and submit to the arbitrator's jurisdiction no later than 07/16/04. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/MF-X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
